message:
Implement export and list commands, fix clippy lints

- Implement export command with JSON, JSONL, and CSV output formats
  - Support for tweets, likes, DMs, followers, following, and all data
  - Output to file or stdout

- Implement list command for browsing indexed data
  - List tweets, likes, DMs, followers, following with nice formatting
  - Color-coded output with truncated text previews

- Add storage retrieval methods:
  - get_all_tweets(), get_all_likes(), get_all_dms()
  - get_all_followers(), get_all_following()
  - All with optional limit parameter

- Fix numerous clippy lints:
  - Add #[must_use] attributes to pure functions
  - Add # Errors documentation to Result-returning functions
  - Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports
  - Use map_or_else instead of if/let for query building
  - Make applicable functions const
  - Fix unused mut warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
